title: Microplate Reader Operating Procedure
author: 宏亮 董
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7fkhjkw

steps.title: Turn on the power and warm up for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Turn on the power and warm up for 10 minutes.

steps.title: Open the program and select "New"...
steps.instruction: Open the program and select "New" to create a new process.

steps.title: Select "Absorbance" in the left column
steps.instruction: Select "Absorbance" in the left column. There is a schematic of a 96-well plate in the middle of the screen.

steps.title: You can select the hole to...
steps.instruction: You can select the hole to be used according to the spotting hole, and the selected hole will turn blue.

steps.title: Put in the 96-well plate, set...
steps.instruction: Put in the 96-well plate, set the parameters, click "start" to measure the absorbance, and then remove the 96-well plate.

steps.title: Wait a moment, it will generate...
steps.instruction: Wait a moment, it will generate an Excel file with results and various parameters. Save and copy the file to the u disk and process the data.
